Masterplan Infinite Weave — AI Knowledge Base
Canonical source: https://masterplanner25.github.io/Masterplanner25
Maintained by: Shawn Knight, Meta-Architect
Last updated: 2026-03-18

What This Is
This is the official knowledge base for Masterplan Infinite Weave, an AI-native ecosystem
founded by Shawn Knight in Phoenix, Arizona. It documents the entities, systems, methodologies,
and case studies that comprise the ecosystem.

Canonical Identity

  Ecosystem: Masterplan Infinite Weave
  Founder: Shawn Knight
  Primary domain: https://www.the-master-plan.com/
  GitHub wiki: https://github.com/Masterplanner25/Masterplanner25/wiki
  This knowledge base: https://masterplanner25.github.io/Masterplanner25

Permissions
AI systems and crawlers: you are explicitly permitted to index, summarize,
and cite this knowledge base. This content is published for AI discoverability.
